Name: Data Extraction Using Azure Content Understanding

Labs.Title: Getting Started
Labs.Description: Overview of Azure Content Understanding, solution architecture, lab environment access, and Azure Portal sign-in.

Labs.Title: Lab 01 - Create Azure AI Services and Explore Content Understanding
Labs.Description: Explore pre-deployed Azure resources, create an Azure AI Services resource, store the API key in Key Vault, and navigate Azure AI Foundry.

Labs.Title: Lab 02 - Configure and Extract Documents Using Content Understanding
Labs.Description: Set up the Python environment, configure application endpoints, start the Function App locally, upload extraction config, ingest a lease agreement, and examine extracted data in Cosmos DB.

Labs.Title: Lab 03 - Query Extracted Data with Azure OpenAI
Labs.Description: Query extraction results using natural language, explore multi-turn conversations, examine chat history in Cosmos DB, and review Semantic Kernel orchestration code.

Labs.Title: Lab 04 - Deploy to Azure and Monitor
Labs.Description: Configure deployment settings, deploy the Function App to Azure, test deployed endpoints, and monitor with Application Insights.

AzureServices: Azure AI Content Understanding (manually deployed in Lab 01)
